rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate rectangular section moment of inertia.
description.long: Calculate rectangular section moment of inertia.

short_i18n.en: Calculate rectangular section moment of inertia.
short_i18n.tr: Dikdörtgen kesitin eğilmeye karşı gösterdiği geometrik direnci (atalet momenti) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnung des Flächenträgheitsmoments eines rechteckigen Querschnitts.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le moment d'inertie d'une section rectangulaire.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el momento de inercia de una sección rectangular.
short_i18n.ar: احسب عزم القصور الذاتي للمقطع المستطيل.
